conversation.text: Hello. I'm new to this app. I have about $3,120 in my checking account right now, I think. Just want to make sure I'm doing this right.

All set ✅ — $3,120.00, payday 2026-05-01.

From here just talk to me: "spent 20 on coffee", "rent 1400 due the 1st", "can I afford 200?" — I'll handle it.
